releases.content:
- Settlements: pick a settlement date (used for exchange rates like expense dates) when settling up or editing
- Settlements in foreign currency with FX preview; activity and cards show the settlement date reliably
- History on expense and settlement detail now records currency and original-amount changes
- Settlement history refreshes right after you save an edit

- Unified tab list: Single scrollable, searchable list for group tabs and direct friends when adding expenses
- Reusable tab cards across add expense, friends, and tabs pages
- Loading animations when selecting tabs
- Full-width tab cards
- Group tabs show your avatar first in the member stack

- React to expenses with emojis: Add, change, or remove your reaction anytime
- Get notified when someone reacts to an expense you're part of
- Tap your reaction to change it or remove it quickly

- Multi-currency support: Set tab currency when creating tabs or via manage page
- Expense restoration: Restore deleted expenses within 30 days
- Improved expense display with proper currency formatting
- Enhanced UI components and mobile experience
- Bug fixes and performance improvements

- AI Add expense: textarea now scrolls into view when keyboard opens on mobile
- Improved mobile keyboard behavior with viewport resize support

- Fixed top nav bar position
- Introduced changelog
